title: myagrum amphibium
intro: Myagrum amphibium, also known as sea holly, is a perennial plant species that grows in coastal areas and is characterized by its prickly leaves and blue flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myagrum amphibium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
